title: New Pilots 30 speculation
wikitext:
[]: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [spoilers])             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Apr 18, 2010 3:33 am During the end of 2.0 we saw the trailer of 3.0 Q! we are shown that there will be an 8th evangelion unit, which we can assume that there will also be a 7th. Misato during the preview for 3.0 says "the awakening of unit 08 and it's pilot." With that quote we aren't told weather or not the pilot is a new one or not so id assume the "awakening" pilot would be Rei since she was dormant "trapped" in unit 01 at the end of the movie. so can we safely assume that Mari and Rei will be getting new eva's since their original ones were destroyed? and Touji has also been left out this time so what of this? What also baffles me is that Kaworu pierced straight through the core of Unit 01, which would have (in the original and possibly rebuild) killed Unit 01. So if unit 01 is Unusable due to the lack of an intact core does that mean he will pilot unit 07 or 08 or possibly even a unit 09? Anyone mind contributing?

[]:             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Sun Apr 18, 2010 6:57 am Would there will be a possibility that Unit 07 have the same fate as Unit 04 ? Sounds impossible...but this is my guess... For Unit 08, Mari I think... Since Asuka desired unit 02 so much. and still wonder whether unit 08 is a fat type Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:12 am edmundasBakashinji wrote: . and still wonder whether unit 08 is a fat type Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:18 am KaaVI wrote: what do you mean by fat type?

[]: Re: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [possible spoilers])             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:28 am KaaVI wrote: What also baffles me is that Kaworu pierced straight through the core of Unit 01, which would have (in the original and possibly rebuild) killed Unit 01. So if unit 01 is Unusable due to the lack of an intact core does that mean he will pilot unit 07 or 08 or possibly even a unit 09?

[]: Re: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [possible spoilers])             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:31 am Azathoth wrote: Remember that Unit 01 apparently had two cores at this point. We don't know which one got hit, or who was in it at the time.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:35 am SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:47 am ran1 wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:54 am Speculation at this point seems fruitless only because 3.0/4.0 is going to be Anno's new plot twist ending. My post was more or less a reflection of that.

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:56 am ran1 wrote: 3.0/4.0 plot twist ending. My post was more or less a reflection of that.

[]: Re: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [possible spoilers])             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:59 am Azathoth wrote: Remember that Unit 01 apparently had two cores at this point. We don't know which one got hit, or who was in it at the time.

[]: Re: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [possible spoilers])             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Apr 18, 2010 8:01 am edmundasBakashinji wrote: Maybe Ritsuko wanna extract that Angel's core before proceed the Shinji and Rei Salvage...

[]: Re: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [possible spoilers])             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Sun Apr 18, 2010 8:30 am KaaVI wrote: Good theory, I don't think Gendo will allow Ritsuko potentially tamper with the power source of Yui.

[]: Re: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [possible spoilers])             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Apr 18, 2010 11:15 pm edmundasBakashinji wrote: anyway, did anyone expected that new characters will come to Eva and be the pilot? probably nobody want it to happen

[]: Re: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [possible spoilers])             Quote Post by skikes » Sun Apr 18, 2010 11:19 pm KaaVI wrote: i doubt that more than 6 pilots are needed. if they reintroduce Touji as a pilot though I doubt people would conplain. but what baffles me is this: 1st children: Rei 2nd children: Asuka 3rd children: Shinji 4th children: ??????????? 5th children: Mari 6th children: Kaworu we are missing a pilot here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 18, 2010 11:43 pm It doesn't. And it's always possible one of the current pilots could have Eva-08 (or the unmentioned in Preview, Eva-07).

[]: Re: New Pilots (3.0 speculation [possible spoilers])             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sun Apr 18, 2010 11:44 pm skikes wrote: Where does it mention Mari and Kaworu's designation in rebuild?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Apr 19, 2010 12:05 am Those numbers correspond to the Unit the pilot is supposed to be piloting. Unless Rei is the zero-eth Children (or Girl in Rebuild). Also, i'm on the opinion that adding new pilots to the mix, or bringing in Touji at this point would be catasthropically bad decisions.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 19, 2010 12:07 am [Edit: SaltyJoe beat me to it, but my post is more detailed, so I'll leave it. :3 ] The numbers on the plugsuits don't correspond to Marduk designations. Rei's suit says "00" and Shinji's says "01". Asuka's is the only one that corresponds, since it says "02". Clearly, the general rule of thumb here is that the numbers on the plugsuit correspond to the Eva being piloted. I'm guessing Mari's "05" is a holdover from her piloting Eva-05. The pink suit may have already been crafted before Eva-05 was destroyed. I think Kaji mentions at the beginning of the film, when Mari is whining about the green suit not accommodating her bosom, that the new supplies haven't arrived yet. Kaworu's "06" would refer to the Mark-06. Mari and Kaworu's Marduk designations, if any, remain unknown.

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Mon Apr 19, 2010 12:08 am SaltyJoe wrote: Those numbers correspond to the Unit the pilot is supposed to be piloting. Unless Rei is the zero-eth Children (or Girl in Rebuild). Also, i'm on the opinion that adding new pilots to the mix, or bringing in Touji at this point would be catasthropically bad decisions.
